title: Xanthobrychis chorassanica
taxonomy: Xanthobrychis chorassanica is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the tribe Hedysareae and is a member of the genus Xanthobrychis. The species is native to Iran. Xanthobrychis chorassanica is closely related to other species within the genus, which are also known as yellow trefoils. The classification of Xanthobrychis chorassanica is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
